title: Kernel config (local-tier slice)
description: The fields a kernel author declares for the first scaffolder step: a config in, a working empty kernel out. Encodes only the local-tier slice from docs kernel-config-schema.md that this slice needs (adopt existing shared common kinds, declare local kinds and sources). The publish/adopt lifecycle, custom floors, custom source classes, and crossing-exposure fields are later slices and are intentionally absent. Each field carries an x-tier annotation naming which tier it belongs to, so the config file carries the fixed-shared-free line as data.

kernel_id.description: The kernel's own id; names its corpora/<kernel_id>/ home and its build files.

adopted_type_hashes.description: The common-kind names this kernel adopts from the shared subtree (corpora/_shared/common-types.js). Adoption pins the hash and freezes the meaning; a name not in the shared subtree is caught by the real check, not the generator.

local_kinds.description: Kinds unique to this kernel, declared locally. Each names a ceiling it can reach. A local kind is untyped abroad by the one law until it is published and adopted; publishing is a later slice.

sources.description: The kernel's source table. source_class must name a class in the substrate menu; the menu itself is substrate-inherited and the real check (makeSourceTable) enforces it, not the generator.

source_class.description: One of the substrate source-class menu; documented here, enforced by the real kernel.

time_lock.description: Time-lock and standing settings; the one clean free parameter (F5), no downstream grounding consequence. Defaults to the register's light setting.
